About

About the Webmaster

Hi! My name is Fire. I'm a [19 year, 2 month, 5 day, XX minute, XX second] old (half-)Filipino-American. I live in North Carolina in the Charlotte metropolitan region.

My main interests are vocal synthesizers, video games, and linguistics. In my free time, I like to draw, write, play games, listen to music, and generally spend time in front of my computer on the internet.

My native language is English. I can speak some Japanese, and bits and pieces of Chinese.

I can read Hangeul, but I don't really know Korean.

It's nice to meet you.

About the Website

I made this website as a space away from traditional social media.

Made with love 2020-forever sinigang.neocities.org. Feel free to copy/steal any of my code.
